title: Public website launch
notes: Launched the public Leda website with product, workflows, plugins, and vision pages.
Added a waitlist form and an honest status system: Available now, In development, Coming soon, Experimental.
Documented the privacy-by-default approach and what Leda intentionally does not do.

title: Workflow builder foundation
notes: Introduced the first version of natural-language workflow drafts.
Added a read-only review step so you can see a workflow before saving it.
Early native tools for notes and study planning.

title: Brain profiles and main chat routing
notes: Added brain profiles so you can choose which AI model answers.
Main chat can route requests to your selected brain.

title: Initial Leda desktop prototype
notes: First desktop prototype with a single chat interface.
Early groundwork for a private, local workspace.
